name: Compliancely
description: Compliancely is a 360-degree identity and tax verification platform covering KYB, KYC, sanctions screening and TIN/EIN checks, aimed at banks, fintechs, marketplaces and enterprises.

seo.title: Compliancely — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Compliancely: Compliancely is a 360-degree identity and tax verification platform covering KYB, KYC, sanctions screening and TIN/EIN checks, aimed at banks, fin

when_to_use: KYC identity check for marketplace seller onboarding
Sanctions screening for cross-border payment platforms
KYB business verification for banking-as-a-service fintechs

pros: Bundles KYB, KYC, sanctions and TIN/EIN checks
IRS TIN matching integrated, rare in compliance APIs
Single vendor for identity and tax verification
cons: Brand less recognized in European compliance
UBO and registry depth below Kyckr or Moody's
review.verdict: One-stop identity and tax verification for US marketplaces, weaker fit for EU-focused compliance.
review.best_for: US marketplaces and enterprises needing TIN/EIN plus KYC/KYB in a single platform
review.not_for: European banks needing deep registry UBO data and eIDAS-aligned identity schemes
